Turn Your Motel Into a High-Performance Asset
Not a 24/7 Headache.

From due diligence to daily operations and elite staffing, we help Australian motel owners maximize profit, reclaim their time, and buy with total confidence.

Book Your Free Strategy Session Explore our Management Courses

Proven in the field. Supported by the industry.

The Reality of the "Motel Lifestyle" vs. The Bottom Line

Full weekends, tired owners, and a bank balance that doesn't match the effort. If you're burnt out—or terrified of buying a lemon—you don't need more hustle. You need a specialist.

The OTA Trap

You're full on weekends but your profit margin hasn't moved. Booking sites own your demand, promos erode your rate, and your "loyalty" sits with an algorithm instead of your own direct guests.

The Manager Merry-Go-Round

You hire on gut feel, not systems. Six months later you're back on Seek, reviews have slipped, and every handover consumes more of your time than the last.

The "Lemon" Risk

For buyers, one missed waterproofing failure, wage underpayment, or inflated add-back can wipe out years of returns. For owners, deferred maintenance and poor records quietly crush your eventual sale price.

Services Designed Around Measurable Results

Every engagement is anchored to your P&L: more profit, cleaner systems, and less time chained to your motel.

Pre-Sale Audit (Due Diligence)

For buyers and vendors who want zero surprises at settlement. We stress-test add-backs, wage assumptions, and capex exposure so you know exactly what you're buying—or selling. The outcome is a clear-eyed view of risk, not a glossy listing story.

Operational Performance Audit

A forensic read on your current operation: occupancy, RevPAR, cost lines, and workflows. We surface leaks in distribution, wage structure, and housekeeping that can be fixed in weeks, not years. You receive a prioritised, practical roadmap instead of a theoretical report.

Manager Recruitment

We help you source, screen, and onboard managers who can actually run a motel, not just work a reception desk. Clear role design, scorecards, and a 90-day ramp plan reduce churn and protect guest experience. You stop rewriting the same ad every six months.

Fractional COO

For owners who want institutional-grade oversight without a full-time salary. We sit above your managers to align pricing, staffing, and strategy with your long-term asset goals. You keep control of the decisions while handing off the noise.

Motel Marketing

No vanity metrics. We focus on shifting guests from OTAs into your own channels, tightening your hotel motel website speed, and using Google Hotel Ads and local SEO to intercept intent. The goal is simple: more direct bookings at higher contribution margin.

Motel Management Training

Structured, Australian-first training for new and existing managers. We turn front desk training, PMS usage, and daily reporting into a repeatable motel system instead of personality-driven chaos. Every module is built to show up on your P&L.

Why a "Motel Coach" and not a Business Coach?

Generic business advice rarely survives contact with real-world motel operations. Australian motels live and die on linen costs, ADR, wage percentages, and how your OTA mix behaves on a wet Tuesday in June.

We've run motels, not just "coached" them. That means we understand motel operations, how to price rooms without blowing up repeat trade, and how to structure rosters that match occupancy instead of habit.

Our frameworks are built for Australian metro and regional markets with actual boots-on-the-ground experience. We know which reports matter, which KPIs move the needle, and how to turn a busy motel into a high-yield asset instead of a 24/7 job.

Motel Coach Profile

We've worked in every role from housekeeping to managing the operations and marketing of a group of 16 motels. We've stripped beds and checked in 1000s of guests.

Designed from lived experience, not theory.

Frequently Asked Questions

What if I'm not happy with my current manager's quality? +

We can either stabilise your existing manager with clear KPIs, training, and support—or help you recruit a replacement with a structured onboarding plan. In both cases the goal is the same: a manager who protects profit instead of consuming your time.

Does my motel need to be a certain size for this to work? +

No. We work with small regional motels through to larger multi-site portfolios. The levers—distribution, staffing, pricing, and guest experience—exist at every room count; we simply scale the operating rhythm and reporting to match your operation.

How long before I see a return on investment? +

Many owners see quick wins within the first 60–90 days as we fix obvious wage, OTA, and pricing leaks. Deeper structural changes—like manager upgrades, process design, and system changes—compound over 6–18 months in both cashflow and asset value.

Motel Coach

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
